prompt:
There is a growing concern among some individuals that too much attention has been directed towards environmental issues, but i thing, that it is very important problem.

Firstly, the impact of human activities on the environment con not be understand. Climate changes, pollution, deforestation are just a few examples we face today. These issues not only threaten the balance of ecosystems, but also have far-reaching consequences for all Earth and ignoring these problems could lead to damages to our planet.

Secondly, the attention given to these problems led to positive outcomes such as increased awareness, policy changes and technological advancements for environment. The rise of renewable energy sources and the push for conservation efforts are all results of the focus on environmental issues.

In conclusion, while some may argue that too much attention has been paid to environmental problems, it is crucial to acknowledge the gravity of these issues and the need of collective action.

Use EXPERT_ANNOTATION, CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, and RANKING_ANCHORS only as supporting context; never override direct evidence from the student text.
Return ONLY one CEFR label from: A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2.
Do not output JSON.
Do not output explanation.

TASK: Some people believe that too much attention has been paid recently to environmental problems. How much do you agree? Write a 4-paragraph essay.
STUDENT_TEXT: There is a growing concern among some individuals that too much attention has been directed towards environmental issues, but i thing, that it is very important problem.

Firstly, the impact of human activities on the environment con not be understand. Climate changes, pollution, deforestation are just a few examples we face today. These issues not only threaten the balance of ecosystems, but also have far-reaching consequences for all Earth and ignoring these problems could lead to damages to our planet.

Secondly, the attention given to these problems led to positive outcomes such as increased awareness, policy changes and technological advancements for environment. The rise of renewable energy sources and the push for conservation efforts are all results of the focus on environmental issues.

In conclusion, while some may argue that too much attention has been paid to environmental problems, it is crucial to acknowledge the gravity of these issues and the need of collective action. 
TEXT_TYPE: essay

I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hi, I know some people who have the simular problem. So, let me try to give you few tips about solving it.

Firstly, the most important thing is time managment. You need to understand when you sleep, eat, go for a walk, etc.

Then, I think it's very nice to solve problems when they was given for you. Don't put them closely to deadlines. If you don't do it, you will have to make many tasks in one-two days. It's surely not good.

My final tip is about eating healthy food. Yes, this tip is really obvios, but without it you probably will have a lot of health difficulties.

So, I hope my tips will help you to get more free time! And it's interesting for me to know, what do you think about it?","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":8,"errors":[{"text":"simular","labels":["Spelling"],"start":36,"end":43},{"text":"few","labels":["Grammar"],"start":80,"end":83},{"text":"managment","labels":["Spelling"],"start":150,"end":159},{"text":"nice","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":250,"end":254},{"text":"for","labels":["Grammar"],"start":293,"end":296},{"text":"was","labels":["Grammar"],"start":283,"end":286},{"text":"put them","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":308,"end":316},{"text":"closely to deadlines.","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":317,"end":338},{"text":" one-two","labels":["Grammar"],"start":394,"end":402},{"text":"obvios","labels":["Spelling"],"start":499,"end":505},{"text":"you probably will ","labels":["Sentence structure"],"start":522,"end":540},{"text":" what do you think about it?","labels":["Sentence structure"],"start":668,"end":696},{"text":" know, what","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":662,"end":673}],"strengths":[{"text":"Firstly","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":108,"end":115},{"text":"My final tip ","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":432,"end":445},{"text":"probably ","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":526,"end":535},{"text":"Then","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":226,"end":230}],"comments":[["significant"]]}},{"ref_id":"sample_07087","cefr_level":"B2","task":"Some people believe that too much attention has been paid recently to environmental problems. How much do you agree? Write a 4-paragraph essay.","student_text":"Nobody can disagree that Earth is our home. It gives us food, beauty of nature, possibilities to create. But as long as we live there, our planet has became more polluted place. Does this pollutions affect environmental problems? Must we pay attention to this problem?

In the modern world more people start to be concerned about environmental problem. But most of them overreact, making pollution problem looks not vital but dumb. And that is a huge problem. It cause politicians do not look at the main point - health of our home - Earth. People who cares about environmental health significantly overreacting and that makes problem look unimportant.

But climate changes is not just fantasies of crazy eco-activists. We can clearly feel it by observing snow in Moscow in the last month of spring. Trash island and tornados should make people think and speak about pollution problem. But in more polite way. Environmental health is important and we must talk about it.

Collecting all thoughts, only people responsible for pollutions and environmental health problems. We need to talk about it and make decisions in the way of making Earth more clear.
